title: Spherical Recreated
description: Spherical ReCreated is a resource pack that will turn all the game cubes into spheres
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/002f8fa81ace55105cc4b1eaf52c904d44ca081b.webp)Spherical ReCreated is a resource pack that will turn all the game cubes into spheres!
This ressource pack was created using the objmc vanilla shader. Do not use it anywhere other than on a skyblock world (Unless you are using a NASA computer)
If you respect this rule the game will remain very fluid even on the smallest computer.
(Full Vanilla, no Optifine needed, 1.19.2)

Actually optifine breaks many blocks such as torches and levers



## Credit:
 Objmc for allowing me to import .obj in minecraft
 No NOréo (Roypase) for everything related to vanilla shaders and beta testing
 Célian 2.0 (boule_de_neige94) for the modeling and everything else
